description_long: This bookcase features a striking, asymmetrical design with five staggered shelves supported by three vertical wooden panels. The wood has a warm, reddish-brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a natural and inviting appearance. The shelves are arranged at varying heights and depths, creating open compartments of different sizes for storing books or displaying decorative items. The vertical supports extend above the top shelf, adding a sculptural element to the overall form. The back and sides are open, allowing for visibility and access from multiple angles. Its modern, geometric style makes it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern, asymmetrical wooden bookcase with five staggered shelves and open sides, finished in warm reddish-brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staggered shelves and open compartments, with all three vertical supports visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single, solid vertical panel and the depth of the bookcase, with shelves mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, revealing the open back and the arrangement of shelves and supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another solid vertical panel, mirroring the other side with shelves mostly obscured.
